mapper.insert: insert into t_member (user_id, level, level_name, discount_rate, total_spending, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{level}, #{levelName}, #{discountRate}, #{totalSpending}, now())
mapper.select: select member_id, user_id, level, level_name, discount_rate, total_spending, create_time, update_time from t_member order by create_time desc
mapper.update: update t_member set total_spending = total_spending + #{amount}, update_time = now() where user_id = #{userId}
